{{Infobox artifact
| name = Sandviper venom
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] was bitten by [[Sandviper venom]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper venom]] can be used to burn channels into the body when guided by [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon's body]] leaked [[madra]] to counteract [[Sandviper venom]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
